label: "Twin Brothers", caption: "二人でD1へ挑む" }, ]; useEf(() => { const t = setInterval(() => setSlide(s => (s+1) % slides.length), 3800); return () => clearInterval(t); }, []); return (
{/* スライドショー背景 */} {slides.map((sl, i) => (
))} {/* 暗いオーバーレイ（グラデーション） */}
{/* スポーツ絵文字デコ */}
{["⚾","🏈","⚽","🎾","🏐"].map((e,i) => ( {e} ))}
{/* スライドキャプション */}
{slides[slide].label}
{slides[slide].caption}
{/* ドットインジケーター */}
{slides.map((_,i) => (
setSlide(i)} style={{ width: slide===i ? 18 : 6, height:6, borderRadius:3, background: slide===i ? "#f59e0b" : "rgba(255,255,255,0.3)", cursor:"pointer", transition:"all 0.3s" }} /> ))}
{/* ログインカード */}

); }; const { useState, useEffect } = React; const { LineChart, Line, AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, PieChart, Pie, Cell, Legend } = window.Recharts || {}; // ===== カラーテーマプリセット（5パターン） ===== const THEME_PRESETS = { classic: { id: "classic", label: "クラシック", emoji: "⚾", preview: { main: "#1B2A4A", accent: "#C4813D" }, navy: "#1B2A4A", navyLight: "#2A3F6B", dirt: ranking: 10, students: 2500, coachBreakdown: { hc: 1, assoc: 0, asst: 1, ops: 0, strength: 0 } }, ]; // ===== ALL_UNIVERSITIES with level tagging ===== const ALL_UNIVERSITIES = [ ...D1_UNIVERSITIES.map(u => ({ ...u, level: 'D1', coachBreakdown: u.coachBreakdown || { hc: 1, assoc: 0, asst: Math.max(0, u.coaches - 2), ops: Math.min(1, Math.max(0, u.coaches - 1)), strength: u.coaches > 3 ? 1 : 0 } })), ...D2_UNIVERSITIES.map(u => ({ ...u, level: 'D2', coachBreakdown: u.coachBreakdown || { hc: 1, assoc: 0, asst: Math.max(0, u.coaches - 2), ops: Math.min(1, Math.max(0, u.coaches - 1)), strength: u.coaches > 3 ? 1 : 0 } })), ...D3_UNIVERSITIES.map(u => ({ ...u, level: 'D3' })), ...NAIA_UNIVERSITIES.map(u => ({ ...u, level: 'NAIA' })), ...JUCO_UNIVERSITIES.map(u => ({ ...u, level: 'JUCO' })), ]; // ===== 実コーチデータ ===== const SAMPLE_COACHES = [ { id: 1, firstName: "Rob", lastName: "Vaughn", email: "rvaughn@ua.edu", university: "Alabama", title: "Head Coach", status: "EMAIL_CLICKED" }, { id: 2, firstName: "Jason", lastName: "Jackson", email: "jjackson@ua.edu", university: "Alabama", title: "Associate HC", status: "EMAIL_SENT" }, { id: 3, firstName: "Kevin", lastName: "O'Sullivan", email: "osullivan@gators.ufl.edu", university: "Florida", title: "Head Coach", status: "RESPONDED" }, { id: 4, firstName: "Gregg", lastName: "Wallis", email: title: "Head Coach", status: "EMAIL_CLICKED" }, { id: 6, firstName: "David", lastName: "Esquer", email: "esquer@stanford.edu", university: "Stanford", title: "Head Coach", status: "EMAIL_SENT" }, { id: 7, firstName: "Tim", lastName: "Corbin", email: "tim.corbin@vanderbilt.edu", university: "Vanderbilt", title: "Head Coach", status: "RESPONDED" }, { id: 8, firstName: "Dusty", lastName: "Baker", "Head Coach", status: "EMAIL_OPENED" }, { id: 10, firstName: "Pete", lastName: "Hughes", email: "phughes@osu.edu", university: "Ohio State", title: "Head Coach", status: "SCHEDULED" }, { id: 11, firstName: "Dan", lastName: "Hartleb", email: "dhartleb@oregonstate.edu", university: "Oregon State", title: "Head Coach", status: "EMAIL_SENT" }, { id: 12, firstName: "Brodie", lastName: "Van Wagenen", email: "bvw@baylor.edu", university: "Baylor", title: "Head Coach", status: "BOUNCED" }, { id: 13, firstName: "Anthony", lastName: "Widom", email: "awidom@coastal.edu", university: "Coastal Carolina", title: "Head Coach", status: "EMAIL_CLICKED" }, { id: 14, firstName: "Jason", lastName: "Kelly", email: "jkelly@tamu.edu", university: "Texas A&M", title: "Head Coach", status: "EMAIL_SENT" }, { id: 15, firstName: "Tony", lastName: "Vitello", email: "tvitello@tennessee.edu", university: "Tennessee", title: "Head Coach", status: "EMAIL_OPENED" }, ]; const SAMPLE_DELIVERIES = [ { university: "LSU", coach: "Dusty Baker", title: "Head Coach", email: "dbaker@lsu.edu", status: "opened", sentAt: "2026/03/01 09:15", openedAt: "2026/03/01 14:22", reaction: "クリック" }, { university: "Coastal Carolina", coach: "Anthony Widom", title: "Head Coach", email: "awidom@coastal.edu", status: "opened", sentAt: "2026/03/01 09:16", openedAt: "2026/03/01 11:05", reaction: "クリック" }, { university: "North Carolina", coach: "Mike Fox", title: "Head Coach", email: "mfox@unc.edu", status: "replied", sentAt: "2026/03/01 09:17", openedAt: "2026/03/02 10:00", reaction: "返信あり!" }, { university: "Oklahoma", coach: "Skip Johnson", title: "Head Coach", email: "sjohnson@ou.edu", status: "sent", sentAt: "2026/03/01 09:18", openedAt: "-", reaction: "-" }, { university: "Louisville", coach: "Dan McDonnell", title: "Head Coach", email: "dmcdonnell@louisville.edu", status: "sent", sentAt: "2026/03/01 09:19", openedAt: "-", reaction: "-" }, { university: "Arkansas", coach: "Dave Van Horn", title: "Head Coach", email: "dvhorn@uark.edu", status: "opened", sentAt: "2026/03/01 09:20", openedAt: "2026/03/02 08:30", reaction: "-" }, { university: "UCLA", coach: "John Savage", title: "Head Coach", email: "jsavage@athletics.ucla.edu", status: "bounced", sentAt: "2026/03/01 09:24", openedAt: "-", reaction: "-" }, { university: "Houston", coach: "Todd Whitt", title: "Head Coach", email: "twhitt@houston.edu", status: "replied", sentAt: "2026/03/01 09:26", openedAt: "2026/03/01 10:15", reaction: "返信あり!" }, ]; const COACH_ROLES = [ { key: "hc", label: "Head Coach", labelJa: "監督", icon: "👑" }, { key: "assoc", label: "Associate / Co-Head Coach", labelJa: "副監督", icon: "⭐" }, { key: "asst", label: "Assistant Coach", labelJa: "アシスタントコーチ", icon: "🧢" }, { key: "ops", label: "Director of Ops / Recruiting", labelJa: "リクルーティング", icon: "📋" }, { key: "strength", label: "Strength & Conditioning", labelJa: "S&C", icon: "💪" }, ]; const TEMPLATES = [ { id: 1, name: "自己紹介型", desc: "初めてのコンタクトに最適", icon: "🤝", subject: "Interested in {{university}} Baseball Program", body: "Dear Coach {{coach_last_name}},\n\nMy name is {{player_name}} and I am a [position] from Japan. I am very interested in your baseball program at {{university}}.\n\n[Your stats and achievements here]\n\nI would love the opportunity to discuss how I might contribute to your team.\n\nThank you for your time,\n{{player_name}}", bodyJa: "{{coach_last_name}}コーチ殿\n\n初めまして。{{player_name}}と申します。日本出身の[ポジション]です。{{university}}の野球プログラムに大変興味を持っております。\n\n[成績・実績をここに記載]\n\n貴チームに貢献できる機会をいただければ幸いです。\n\nよろしくお願いいたします。\n{{player_name}}" }, { id: 2, name: "実績アピール型", desc: "成績・受賞歴がある選手向け", icon: "📊", subject: "{{player_name}} - [Position] | [Key Stats] | {{university}}", body: "Dear Coach {{coach_last_name}},\n\nI hope this email finds you well. My name is {{player_name}}, a [position] from [City], Japan.\n\nKey Stats:\n- Fastball: 89-92 mph\n- ERA: 1.85\n- [Additional stats]\n\nI believe my skills would be a strong fit for {{university}}'s program.\n\nBest regards,\n{{player_name}}", bodyJa: "{{coach_last_name}}コーチ殿\n\nお忙しいところ失礼いたします。日本の[都市名]出身の[ポジション]、{{player_name}}です。\n\n主な成績:\n- 球速: 143-148 km/h\n- 防御率: 1.85\n- [その他の成績]\n\n{{university}}のプログラムに適した選手であると確信しております。\n\n{{player_name}}" }, { id: 3, name: "動画リンク付き型", desc: "プレー動画が武器の選手向け", icon: "🎬", subject: "Video Highlights - {{player_name}} | [Position]", body: "Dear Coach {{coach_last_name}},\n\nPlease find my highlight video below:\n[Video Link]\n\nI am a [position] from Japan, interested in {{university}}.\n\nAdditional videos and stats available at: [Profile Link]\n\nThank you,\n{{player_name}}", bodyJa: "{{coach_last_name}}コーチ殿\n\n以下のリンクからハイライト動画をご覧ください:\n[動画リンク]\n\n日本出身の[ポジション]で、{{university}}に興味がございます。\n\nその他の動画・成績: [プロフィールリンク]\n\n{{player_name}}" }, ]; const STATUS_CONFIG = { pending: { label: "配信待ち", color: "#3B82F6", icon: "⏳" }, sent: { label: "配信済み", color: "#10B981", icon: "✅" }, bounced: { label: "バウンス", color: "#EF4444", icon: "❌" }, error_invalid: { label: "無効アドレス", color: "#EF4444", icon: "❌" }, opened: { label: "開封済み", color: "#8B5CF6", icon: "👀" }, replied: { label: "反応あり", color: "#F97316", icon: "💬" }, clicked: { label: "クリック", color: "#F97316", icon: "🔗" }, }; // Status names in Japanese const STATUS_NAMES_JA = { EMAIL_CLICKED: "クリック済", BOUNCED: "バウンス", EMAIL_SENT: "配信済", SCHEDULED: "配信予約", EMAIL_OPENED: "開封済", RESPONDED: "返信あり", }; const DAILY_LIMIT = 200; const LEVEL_STATS = { D1: { schools: 253, color: "#C41E3A", desc: "NCAA Division I" }, D2: { schools: 64, color: "#1B2A4A", desc: "NCAA Division II" }, D3: { schools: 395, color: "#2D5A27", desc: "NCAA Division III" }, NAIA: { schools: 195, color: "#C4813D", desc: "National Assoc. of Intercollegiate Athletics" }, JUCO: { schools: 489, color: "#6B7280", desc: "Junior College / Community College" }, }; // ===== Pricing Tiers ===== const PRICING = { currency: "¥", tiers: [ { level: "D1", rankMin: 1, rankMax: 25, price: 500, label: "D1 Top25" }, { level: "D1", rankMin: 26, rankMax: 50, price: 400, label: "D1 26-50" }, { level: "D1", rankMin: 51, rankMax: 100, price: 350, label: "D1 51-100" }, { level: "D1", rankMin: 101, rankMax: 9999, price: 300, label: "D1 100+" }, { level: "D2", rankMin: 1, rankMax: 10, price: 350, label: "D2 Top10" }, { level: "D2", rankMin: 11, rankMax: 30, price: 300, label: "D2 11-30" }, { level: "D2", rankMin: 31, rankMax: 9999, price: 200, label: "D2 31+" }, { level: "D3", rankMin: 1, rankMax: 9999, price: 200, label: "D3" }, { level: "NAIA", rankMin: 1, rankMax: 9999, price: 150, label: "NAIA" }, { level: "JUCO", rankMin: 1, rankMax: 9999, price: 100, label: "JUCO" }, ] }; const getTier = (u) => { const tier = PRICING.tiers.find(t => t.level === u.level && u.ranking >= t.rankMin && u.ranking <= t.rankMax); return tier || PRICING.tiers[PRICING.tiers.length - 1]; }; // ===== SVGコンポーネント ===== const BaseballStitchSVG = () => ( ); const DiamondIcon = ({ size = 16 }) => ( ); const Badge = ({ children, color = "blue" }) => { const colors = { blue: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800", green: "bg-green-100 text-green-800", red: "bg-red-100 text-red-800", yellow: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800", purple: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-800", orange: "bg-orange-100 text-orange-800", gray: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-800", navy: "text-white", dirt: "text-white", }; const bgOverride = color === "navy" ? { backgroundColor: THEME.navy } : color === "dirt" ? { backgroundColor: THEME.dirt } : {}; return {children}; }; const Nav = ({ right, onNavigate }) => (
onNavigate && onNavigate("dashboard")}> ⚾
AthleteGate BASEBALL
{right}
); const AnimatedNumber = ({ target, duration = 1200 }) => { const [val, setVal] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { let start = 0; const step = Math.max(1, Math.floor(target / (duration / 16))); const timer = setInterval(() => { start += step; if (start >= target) { setVal(target); clearInterval(timer); } else setVal(start); }, 16); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, [target, duration]); return {val.toLocaleString()}; }; // SVGラインアイコン（プロフェッショナル仕様） const StatIcon = ({ type }) => { const paths = { school: <>, users: <>, send: <>, eye: <>, reply: <>, }; return ( ); }; const ScoreboardNumber = ({ label, value, sub, iconType, highlight }) => (
{label}
{sub && {sub}}
); // --- 画面1: ログイン --- const SLIDE_PHOTOS = [ { src: caption: "SWOCC 卒業式" }, ]; const LoginScreen = ({ onNavigate }) => { const { useState: useStateL, useEffect: useEffectL } = React; const [slide, setSlide] = useStateL(0); const [fading, setFading] = useStateL(false); useEffectL(() => { const timer = setInterval(() => { setFading(true); setTimeout(() => { setSlide(s => (s + 1) % SLIDE_PHOTOS.length); setFading(false); }, 600); }, 4500); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, []); const goSlide = (i) => { setFading(true); setTimeout(() => { setSlide(i); setFading(false); }, 400); }; return (
{/* ===== 写真スライダー上半分 ===== */}
{/* スライド画像 */}
{/* 下グラデードオーバーレイ */}
{/* タイトルロゴ */}
ATHLETE GATE
Your Gateway to
U.S. College Baseball
{/* キャプション */}
{SLIDE_PHOTOS[slide].caption}
{/* ドットナビ */}

{/* ===== ログインフォーム下半分 ===== */}

); }; // --- 画面2: ダッシュボード --- const Dashboard = ({ onNavigate, themeId, changeTheme, darkMode, setDarkMode, qaOpen, setQaOpen }) => { const [qaPage, setQaPage] = useState("intro"); // "intro" | "fill" const [expandedPkgs, setExpandedPkgs] = useState({}); const [animStep, setAnimStep] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { const t = setInterval(() => setAnimStep(s => (s + 1) % 8), 2000); return () => clearInterval(t); }, []); // 新しい順（登録日の降順）にソート const packages = [ { id: 1, level: "D1", roles: "HC, Asst", states: "CA, AZ, FL", targets: 12, coachCount: 68, status: "active", createdAt: "2026-03-01", startDate: "2026/03/01", stats: { pending: 5, sent: 30, opened: 20, replied: 8, error: 5 }, timeline: [ { d: "3/1", s: 40, o: 0, r: 0 }, { d: "3/2", s: 12, o: 15, r: 2 }, { d: "3/3", s: 6, o: 28, r: 5 }, { d: "3/4", s: 0, o: 35, r: 8 }, { d: "3/5", s: 0, o: 38, r: 12 }, { d: "3/6", s: 0, o: 40, r: 18 }, ]}, { id: 2, level: "D2+NAIA", roles: "HC", states: "FL, TX, CA", targets: 18, coachCount: 32, status: "completed", createdAt: "2026-02-15", startDate: "2026/02/15", stats: { pending: 0, sent: 5, opened: 15, replied: 10, error: 2 }, timeline: [ { d: "2/15", s: 32, o: 0, r: 0 }, { d: "2/16", s: 0, o: 12, r: 2 }, { d: "2/17", s: 0, o: 22, r: 6 }, { d: "2/18", s: 0, o: 28, r: 10 }, ]}, { id: 3, level: "D1", roles: "HC", states: "TX, OK, AR, LA", targets: 8, coachCount: 24, status: "completed", createdAt: "2026-01-20", startDate: "2026/01/20", stats: { pending: 0, sent: 2, opened: 10, replied: 12, error: 0 }, timeline: [] }, ].sort((a, b) => new Date(b.createdAt) - new Date(a.createdAt)); const totalCoaches = packages.reduce((sum, p) => sum + Object.values(p.stats).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0), 0); // 登録日を「3月1日（土）」形式にフォーマット const formatDate = (dateStr) => { const d = new Date(dateStr); const days = ["日","月","火","水","木","金","土"]; return `${d.getMonth()+1}月${d.getDate()}日（${days[d.getDay()]}）`; }; // 「○日前」を計算 const daysAgo = (dateStr) => { const diff = Math.floor((new Date("2026-03-07") - new Date(dateStr)) / 86400000); if (diff === 0) return "今日"; if (diff === 1) return "昨日"; return `${diff}日前`; }; const bg = darkMode ? "#0d1117" : THEME.chalk; const textColor = darkMode ? "#c9d1d9" : THEME.navy; return (

{STATUS_NAMES_JA[s.label]}
15 ? "#fff" : s.color }}>{s.count}

); })}

{packages.map((pkg, idx) => { const total = Object.values(pkg.stats).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0); const statusLabel = pkg.status === "active" ? "🟢 配信中" : "✅ 完了"; const isActive = pkg.status === "active"; const isLatest = idx === 0; const isExpanded = isLatest || expandedPkgs[pkg.id]; const toggleExpand = (e) => { if (!isLatest) { e.stopPropagation(); setExpandedPkgs(prev => ({ ...prev, [pkg.id]: !prev[pkg.id] })); } }; return (
{/* ヘッダー（常に表示） */}
onNavigate("detail") : toggleExpand}>
{formatDate(pkg.createdAt)} {!isLatest && ( {pkg.level} {pkg.coachCount}通 )} {isLatest && {daysAgo(pkg.createdAt)}}
{statusLabel} {!isLatest && ( )}
{/* カード本体（展開時のみ表示） */} {isExpanded && (
onNavigate("detail")}>
{pkg.level} {pkg.states} | {pkg.roles}
{pkg.targets}校 → {pkg.coachCount}名に配信
{pkg.coachCount}通
{(() => { const segments = [ { key: "replied", label: "反応", value: pkg.stats.replied, color: THEME.dirt }, { key: "opened", label: "開封", value: pkg.stats.opened, color: "#8B5CF6" }, { key: "sent", label: "配信", value: pkg.stats.sent, color: THEME.grassLight }, { key: "pending", label: "待ち", value: pkg.stats.pending, color: "#93C5FD" }, ].filter(s => s.value > 0); return (
{segments.map(seg => { const pct = (seg.value / total) * 100; return (
0 ? "2rem" : 0, cursor: "default" }}> {pct >= 15 ? `${seg.label} ${seg.value}` : seg.value}
); })}
{segments.some(s => (s.value / total) * 100 < 15) && (
{segments.filter(s => (s.value / total) * 100 < 15).map(seg => (
{seg.label} {seg.value}
))}
)}
); })()}
)}
); })}
{/* フッター分のスペース確保 */}
{/* フローティングフッター */} {/* ===== QA-Fill フローティングボタン ===== */} {/* ===== QA-Fill パネル ===== */} {qaOpen && qaPage === "intro" && setQaPage("fill")} onClose={() => setQaOpen(false)} darkMode={darkMode} />} {qaOpen && qaPage === "fill" && setQaOpen(false)} darkMode={darkMode} />}
); }; // --- 画面3: ターゲット設定 --- const TargetSetup = ({ onNavigate, planState, setPlanState }) => { const allLevels = ["D1", "D2", "D3", "NAIA", "JUCO"]; const allStates = ["AL","AZ","AR","CA","CO","CT","FL","GA","HI","ID","IL","IN","IA","KS","KY","LA","MA","MD","MI","MN","MO","MS","MT","NC","NE","NJ","NM","NV","NY","OH","OK","OR","PA","SC","SD","TN","TX","UT","VA","WA","WI","WV","WY"]; const rankGroups = [ { label: "Top 25", min: 1, max: 25 }, { label: "Top 50", min: 1, max: 50 }, { label: "Top 100", min: 1, max: 100 }, { label: "101-200", min: 101, max: 200 }, { label: "201+", min: 201, max: 9999 }, { label: "全て", min: 1, max: 9999 }, ]; const presets = [ { label: "🇺🇸 全米", states: allStates }, { label: "🌴 西海岸", states: ["CA", "OR", "WA", "AZ", "NV", "HI"] }, { label: "🗽 東海岸", states: ["NY", "NJ", "CT", "MA", "PA", "MD", "VA", "NC", "SC", "FL", "GA"] }, { label: "🤠 南部", states: ["TX", "FL", "GA", "AL", "TN", "SC", "LA", "MS", "AR", "OK"] }, { label: "🏔️ 山岳", states: ["CO", "UT", "MT", "ID", "NM", "WY", "SD"] }, ]; const toggleItem = (arr, item) => { const updated = arr.includes(item) ? arr.filter(i => i !== item) : [...arr, item]; return updated; }; const handleLevelChange = (level) => { setPlanState(prev => ({ ...prev, levels: toggleItem(prev.levels, level) })); }; const handleStateChange = (state) => { setPlanState(prev => ({ ...prev, states: toggleItem(prev.states, state) })); }; const handleRoleChange = (role) => { setPlanState(prev => ({ ...prev, roles: toggleItem(prev.roles, role) })); }; const handleStatePreset = (states) => { setPlanState(prev => ({ ...prev, states })); }; // Calculate filtered universities based on planState const filteredUnis = ALL_UNIVERSITIES.filter(u => planState.levels.includes(u.level) && planState.states.includes(u.state) ); const roundedSchools = filteredUnis.length; // Calculate total coaches from actual data const totalCoaches = filteredUnis.reduce((sum, u) => { let count = 0; planState.roles.forEach(role => { count += u.coachBreakdown[role] || 0; }); return sum + count; }, 0); const topUnis = [...D1_UNIVERSITIES].sort((a, b) => a.ranking - b.ranking).slice(0, 5); return ( <>

⚾ スポーツ

選択する役職を増やすと配信先コーチ数が増えます

D1は最高レベル、JUCOは短大リーグです

{allLevels.map(l => { const info = LEVEL_STATS[l]; return ( ); })}

大学のランキングで絞り込み

{rankGroups.map(rg => ( ))}

{presets.map(p => ( ))}
{allStates.map(s => ( ))}

🔥 2025 Top 5

#{u.ranking}
{u.name}
{u.conf}
))}

); }; // --- 画面4: ターゲット確認 --- const TargetConfirm = ({ onNavigate, planState }) => { const filteredUnis = ALL_UNIVERSITIES.filter(u => planState.levels.includes(u.level) && planState.states.includes(u.state) ); return (

setPlanState(prev => ({ ...prev, templateId: t.id }))} className={`p-6 rounded-xl border cursor-pointer transition ${planState.templateId === t.id ? "shadow-lg" : "shadow-sm hover:shadow-md"}`} style={planState.templateId === t.id ? { borderColor: THEME.dirt, backgroundColor: THEME.dirt + "08" } : {}}>

); }; // --- 画面6: スケジュール設定 --- const ScheduleSetup = ({ onNavigate, planState, setPlanState }) => { const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; return (

配信日時を設定

setPlanState(prev => ({ ...prev, startDate: e.target.value }))} className="w-full px-4 py-3 border rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:outline-none" style={{ borderColor: THEME.navy + "40" }} />

); }; // --- 画面7: 支払い確認 --- const PaymentScreen = ({ onNavigate, planState }) => { const filteredUnis = ALL_UNIVERSITIES.filter(u => planState.levels.includes(u.level) && planState.states.includes(u.state) ); // Calculate total by tier const tierBreakdown = {}; let totalPrice = 0; filteredUnis.forEach(u => { const tier = getTier(u); if (!tierBreakdown[tier.label]) { tierBreakdown[tier.label] = { count: 0, price: tier.price }; } tierBreakdown[tier.label].count += 1; totalPrice += tier.price; }); const selectedTemplate = TEMPLATES.find(t => t.id === planState.templateId); return (

プラン概要

配信対象校: {filteredUnis.length}校
レベル: {planState.levels.join(", ")}
テンプレート: {selectedTemplate?.name}
配信開始日: {planState.startDate || "未設定"}

料金内訳

{Object.entries(tierBreakdown).map(([label, data]) => (
{label}
{data.count}校
¥{(data.price * data.count).toLocaleString()}
¥{data.price} × {data.count}
))}
合計 ¥{totalPrice.toLocaleString()}

確認

"#0f1225" : "#ffffff"; const textColor = darkMode ? "#e0e4f0" : "#1e293b"; const subColor = darkMode ? "#8891b0" : "#64748b"; const borderColor = darkMode ? "#1d2242" : "#e2e8f0"; const accentColor = "#f59e0b"; const steps = [ { icon: "📝", emoji: null, title: "①　QA-Fillを開く", desc: "右下の📝ボタンをタップ", svg: ( ) }, { icon: "🧑‍⚾", title: "②　選手を選択", desc: "ヤマト or タケル を選んでデータ確認", svg: ( ) }, { icon: "🔗", title: "③　Bookmarkletをコピー", desc: "パネル下部の「🔗 フォーム自動入力ブックマークレットをコピー」ボタンをクリック", svg: ( ) }, { icon: "⭐", title: "④　ブックマークに追加", desc: "コピーしたコードをブラウザのブックマーク→新規追加→URL欄に貼り付けて保存", svg: ( ) }, { icon: "🌐", title: "⑤　大学のフォームを開く", desc: "コーチからのメールに届いたアンケートURLを開く", svg: ( ) }, { icon: "✅", title: "⑥　ブックマークをクリック！", desc: "ブックマークバーの「QA-Fill」をクリックで自動入力完了。黄色ハイライトで確認できます", svg: ( ) }, ]; return (
{/* ヘッダー */}
📋

))} {/* ポイント補足 */}

dob:"12/27/2004", email:"takeru@baseball.zetalabo.biz", personalEmail:"t12271801@gmail.com", mobile:"+81 7041005395", instagram:"@takeru_onozaki", twitter:"@takeru_onozaki" }, parent: { fbVelocity:"85-89 mph (topped 90)", sliderVelocity:"76 mph", curveVelocity:"68-70 mph", era:"3.09", ip:"67", strikeouts:"53", record:"4-3", whip:"1.35", ofArmVelocity:"92 mph", exitVelocity:"93 mph", sixtyYard:"7.25 sec" }, club: { clubName:"Tohoku Marks", clubCity:"Sendai" }, links: { fieldLevel:"https://www.fieldlevel.com/app/profile/takeru.onozaki/baseball", youtube:"https://youtu.be/3QO8xkjVij8?t=511", fiveTool:"https://fivetool.org/players/da3f180a-77f4-4e14-a970-b6dffb6d9577" } } }; const QA_LABELS = { firstName:"First Name", lastName:"Last Name", preferredName:"Preferred Name", country:"Country", addressType:"Address Type", street:"Street", city:"City", state:"State", zip:"Zip", gradYear:"Grad Year", dob:"Date of Birth", email:"Email (Coach用)", personalEmail:"Email (個人)", mobile:"Mobile", instagram:"Instagram", twitter:"Twitter/X", p1FirstName:"Parent 1 名", p1LastName:"Parent 1 姓", p1Gender:"Parent 1 Gender", p1Occupation:"Parent 1 職業", p1Email:"Parent 1 Email", p1LivingWith:"Living With", siblings:"Siblings", p2FirstName:"Parent 2 名", p2LastName:"Parent 2 姓", schoolName:"School", schoolCity:"School City", schoolState:"School State", gpa:"GPA", intendedMajor:"Intended Major", eligibilityCenter:"NCAA Eligibility", eligibilityId:"Eligibility ID ⚠", toefl:"TOEFL", height:"Height", weight:"Weight (lbs)", positions:"Position(s)", throwingHand:"Throws", battingHand:"Bats", fbVelocity:"FB Velocity", sliderVelocity:"Slider", curveVelocity:"Curve", era:"ERA", ip:"IP", strikeouts:"K (Strikeouts)", confERA:"Conf. ERA", record:"Record", whip:"WHIP", ofArmVelocity:"OF Arm", exitVelocity:"Exit Velocity", sixtyYard:"60yd dash", clubName:"Club/Team", clubCity:"Club City", fieldLevel:"FieldLevel", youtube:"YouTube", fiveTool:"FiveTool" }; const QAFillPanel = ({ onClose, darkMode }) => { const { useState: useStateQA, useEffect: useEffectQA, useCallback: useCallbackQA } = React; const [player, setPlayer] = useStateQA("yamato"); const [section, setSectionQA] = useStateQA("personal"); const [data, setDataQA] = useStateQA(QA_DEFAULT); const [copied, setCopied] = useStateQA(null); const [editing, setEditing] = useStateQA(null); const [msg, setMsg] = useStateQA(""); // localStorage から読み込み useEffectQA(() => { try { const saved = localStorage.getItem("qa-fill-v1"); if (saved) { const parsed = JSON.parse(saved); const merged = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(QA_DEFAULT)); ["yamato","takeru"].forEach(pl => { Object.keys(merged[pl]).forEach(s => { if (parsed[pl] && parsed[pl][s]) { Object.entries(parsed[pl][s]).forEach(([k,v]) => { if(v) merged[pl][s][k]=v; }); } }); }); setDataQA(merged); } } catch(e) {} }, []); const saveData = useCallbackQA((d) => { try { localStorage.setItem("qa-fill-v1", JSON.stringify(d)); setMsg("✓"); setTimeout(()=>setMsg(""),1000); } catch(e) {} }, []); const doCopy = useCallbackQA(async (f, v) => { if (!v) return; try { await navigator.clipboard.writeText(v); setCopied(f); setTimeout(()=>setCopied(null),1000); } catch(e) {} }, []); const doEdit = useCallbackQA((f, v) => { setDataQA(prev => { const n = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(prev)); n[player][section][f] = v; saveData(n); return n; }); }, [player, section, saveData]); const d = data[player]; const fields = d[section] ? Object.keys(d[section]) : []; const isY = player === "yamato"; const ac = isY ? "#6366f1" : "#d97706"; const panelBg = darkMode ? "#0f1225" : "#ffffff"; const fieldBg = darkMode ? "#131730" : "#f8fafc"; const fieldBorder = darkMode ? "#1d2242" : "#e2e8f0"; const labelColor = darkMode ? "#6b7294" : "#94a3b8"; const valueColor = darkMode ? "#e0e4f0" : "#1e293b"; return (
{/* パネルヘッダー */}
⚾ QA-Fill {msg && {msg}}
{/* 選手切替 */} {[{id:"yamato",l:"ヤマト",c:"#6366f1"},{id:"takeru",l:"タケル",c:"#d97706"}].map(p => ( ))}
{/* セクションタブ */}
{Object.entries(QA_SECTIONS).map(([k,l]) => ( ))}
{/* フィールドリスト */}
{fields.map(f => { const v = d[section][f] || ""; const lbl = QA_LABELS[f] || f; const isCopied = copied === f; const isEditing = editing === f; const empty = !v; return (
{lbl}
{isEditing ? ( doEdit(f, e.target.value)} onBlur={() => setEditing(null)} onKeyDown={e => { if(e.key==="Enter") setEditing(null); }} style={{ width:"100%", padding:"2px 4px", border:`1px solid ${ac}`, borderRadius:3, background: darkMode?"#080b16":"#fff", color: darkMode?"#eef0f6":"#1e293b", fontSize:11, fontFamily:"monospace", outline:"none", boxSizing:"border-box" }} /> ) : (
{ if(empty) setEditing(f); }} style={{ fontSize:11, fontFamily: v ? "monospace" : "inherit", color: empty ? "#ef4444" : v.startsWith("http") ? "#60a5fa" : valueColor, fontStyle: empty ? "italic" : "normal", wordBreak:"break-all", cursor: empty ? "pointer" : "default" }}> {v || "⚠ tap to fill"}
)}
); })}
{/* ===== Bookmarklet取得ボタン ===== */}
); }; const App = () => { const [currentScreen, setCurrentScreen] = useState("login"); const [themeId, setThemeId] = useState("classic"); const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false); const [qaOpen, setQaOpen] = useState(false); const [planState, setPlanState] = useState({ levels: ["D1"], states: ["CA", "TX", "FL"], roles: ["hc", "asst"], rankings: "全て", templateId: 1, startDate: "", excluded: [] }); // テーマ切り替え const changeTheme = (id) => { THEME = { ...THEME_PRESETS[id] }; // 新オブジェクトに再代入してReactが変化を検知 setThemeId(id); }; const onNavigate = (screen) => setCurrentScreen(screen); return ( <> {currentScreen === "login" && } {currentScreen === "dashboard" && } {currentScreen === "target" && } {currentScreen === "confirm" && } {currentScreen === "template" && } {currentScreen === "schedule" && } {currentScreen === "payment" && } {currentScreen === "detail" && } {currentScreen === "dbmanage" && } ); }; ReactDOM.createRoot(document.getElementById("root")).render();
